layout_memory.summary: tts01 uses a full captured AnchorFrame. First version sends the full frame as ModelInputRegion unless margins are configured.

regions.content_region: Useful remote page content after configured crop margins.
regions.model_input_region: Region intended for later multimodal parsing.

visual_parsing_rules: Expect image-related content to be important when visible.
Do not assume recurring answer positions from earlier runs.
answer_rules: Prefer human review when image evidence is unclear or missing.
confidence_rules: Require review when the selected answer depends on fine visual details.
